IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (25676643.pdf)
SUMMARY: Experienced HR professional with a strong background in staffing, recruitment, and policy advisement. Skilled in developing and implementing programs to enhance organizational performance through effective communication and strategic planning.
SKILLS: HR Management, Recruitment Strategies, Policy Advisement, Internship Program Development, Social Media Management, Event Organization, Job Analysis and Job Announcement Drafting, Delegated Examining Processes, Pathways Programs Consultation

SOURCE: 25676643.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Specialist
COMPANY: 
DATES: 12/2016 - Present
DESCRIPTION: ['Provided HR advisory services to mid-level and senior managers.', 'Served as a subject matter expert on hiring authorities and flexibilities within Merit Staffing Procedures and Delegated Examining.', 'Consulted with HR managers and hiring officials regarding the use of Pathways Programs such as Internships, Recent Graduates, and Presidential Manager Fellows.']

SOURCE: 25676643.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Specialist
COMPANY: 
DATES: 09/2013 - 12/2016
DESCRIPTION: ['Devised marketing and branding initiatives to increase agency advertisement and visibility among colleges and universities.', 'Facilitated information sessions on resume writing, internship programs, and interviewing skills.', 'Developed recruitment strategies and managed tactical plans for completing recruitment projects.']

SOURCE: 25676643.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Assistant
COMPANY: 
DATES: 10/2011 - 09/2013
DESCRIPTION: ['Provided effective and timely customer and technical support in delegated examining and staffing processes.', 'Drafted job analysis and job announcements for Wage Grade and General Schedule positions.']
